## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content creation strategies, workflow improvements, and upcoming tasks for GrowthX's social media management.](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siftin tool recommended for Reddit/Quora monitoring; LinkedIn monitoring tool needed](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Notion workflow clarified: use '/' command to create new pages](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Transition from Napa agency to in-house content creation for Thiago's account](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Upcoming call with Thiago to discuss AI agents and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Topics

### Content Monitoring and Ideation Tools

  - [Siftin recommended for Reddit, Quora, and community monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [LinkedIn monitoring tool needed to surface engagement threads](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Action item: Rafid to create a doc listing information streams for ideation](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Notion Workflow Improvements

  - [Confusion resolved: use '/' command to create new pages in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Approval process needs refinement: Rafid to request Jason's approval first, then Thiago's](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Jason to approve next 3 posts; 2 pending Thiago's approval](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Transition from Napa Agency

  - [Napa engagement ended due to misalignment with agency owner, not performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Thiago was satisfied with Napa's work; transition reasoning: bring AI workflows in-house](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Focus on automation and workflows, especially with adding Thiago's company account](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)

  - [Rafid to prepare questions for Wednesday call to guide content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/sJy-k-H2Spjrmkkz-PE-B_vwf4Wx2xDX?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
